section.name: BreakTest Documentation
section.p: BreakTest is an independent, Apache-2.0, JMeter-compatible performance testing tool. These docs intentionally focus on what is different in BreakTest, not on maintaining a second copy of the Apache JMeter manual.

ul.li: Release Notes describe the latest BreakTest release and earlier BreakTest release history.
BreakTest Features explains the new BreakTest-only behavior and differences.
Getting Started covers the BreakTest runtime, scripts, and Java 21 requirement.
JMeter Compatibility explains where to use the official Apache JMeter docs.

section.h2: Use The Apache JMeter Docs For The Base Model
section.p: BreakTest keeps the JMX test-plan model and many components from Apache JMeter. For generic documentation about thread groups, samplers, listeners, functions, assertions, extractors, controllers, templates, and most properties, use the official Apache JMeter User Manual.
When BreakTest changes inherited behavior, the difference is documented locally in the BreakTest feature manual and release notes.

BreakTest is a derivative work of Apache JMeter 5.6.3. Apache JMeter copyright, license, and notice information is retained in the source tree and distributions. BreakTest is independent from The Apache Software Foundation and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by The Apache Software Foundation.
